benefits.description: Has to force the thought of wanting to drink; mostly only drinks socially or for special occasions

side_effects.description: GI distress (diarrhea) when combining alcohol with cheat/high-fat meals while on Reta

protocol_notes: Recommends waiting at least 2 weeks before drinking. Currently has 1-2 drinks on Saturdays, preferring spirits with citrus and light sweetener. Recommends avoiding beer. Diet must be lean and high protein when drinking.
